items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
Dailyn Swain and Noa Essengue will head home from Vegas with different questions to answer. 

The next time we see them — presumably in the preseason — we'll get our first glimpse of how they've built on this experience.

items.title: Noa Essengue with a monster block, gets hurt, then tries to bull his way to the basket while still clearly hurting and gets straight up ripped. Absolutely painful sequence to watch. He is very very bad offensively right now.

items.title: Liked what I saw out of Noa Essengue. Four blocks, two steals, two offensive rebounds, only one turnover. He's going to challenge a lot of shots with his length, and looks confident driving with his strong hand. Also continues to be a foul magnet. Gotta start making free throws.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Liked what I saw out of Noa Essengue. Four blocks, two steals, two offensive rebounds, only one turnover. He's going to challenge a lot of shots with his length, and looks confident driving with his strong hand. Also continues to be a foul magnet. Gotta start making free throws.

items.title: Noa Essengue gets a second chance to make a first impression on Chicago after his lost rookie season.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
Noa Essengue gets a second chance to make a first impression on Chicago after his lost rookie season.

That process starts with his long-awaited return to the court in summer league:

media.title: Chicago Bulls’ Noa Essengue gets a 2nd chance at a 1st impression after a lost rookie season
media.description: After playing in only two NBA games as a rookie, Chicago Bulls forward Noa Essengue has a lot to prove in both summer league and his second season.

items.title: As a Noa Essengue true believer, I can't wait to see what he looks like in summer league. Now listed at 6'11. He measured 3/4ths of inch taller than Caleb at the combine, and sure looks like he's quite a bit taller than that.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: As a Noa Essengue true believer, I can't wait to see what he looks like in summer league. Now listed at 6'11. He measured 3/4ths of inch taller than Caleb at the combine, and sure looks like he's quite a bit taller than that.
